title: Mark Crowther
compiled_truth: Mark Crowther is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-10-09 to 2001-11-30), Mark Crowther sent 5 and received 61 emails, totalling 66 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (5), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (3), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (3), [Nicholas O'Day](people/nicholas-o-day) (2), [Mika Watanabe](people/mika-watanabe) (1).
